title: maternal-health-ml-two-cohort: Analysis code for machine learning-based maternal health risk stratification using two IoT-collected Bangladeshi datasets
description: Analysis code for: Machine learning for maternal health risk stratification using IoT-collected clinical datasets from Bangladesh: a two-cohort comparative analysis. Six ML classifiers (Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, Decision Tree, Logistic Regression, SVM) applied to two independent datasets (UCI n=1,014, 6 features, 3-class; Mendeley n=1,186, 11 features, binary). SHAP analysis identifies BMI, preexisting diabetes, and mental health as dominant predictors in the extended dataset.
